# shell

App shell for Studio. Registers the /studio app entry and defines Studio.Sidebar/Toolbar slots.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: App shell for Studio. Registers the /studio app entry and defines Studio.Sidebar/Toolbar slots.
- Web:
  - Slots: `Studio.Sidebar` ← `apps.studio.compositions`, `apps.studio.contributions`, `apps.studio.explorer`, `apps.studio.graph`, `Studio.Toolbar`
  - Contributes: `Apps.App` "Studio" → `StudioLayout`
  - Uses: `apps-core.Apps`, `apps-core/app-icon.mdAppIcon`, `layouts/miller.MillerColumns`, `primitives/app-shell.AppShellLayout`, `primitives/slot-render.defineRenderSlot`
  - Exports: Values: `Studio`
- Core:
  - Uses: `primitives/pane.defineApp`
  - Exports: Values: `studioApp`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `apps/studio/compositions`, `apps/studio/contributions`, `apps/studio/explorer`, `apps/studio/graph`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
